originalityStatement: This synthetic contract fixture was authored for Storyteller validation and contains no source map, character, dialogue, audiovisual signature, or encounter sequence.
purpose: selection contract fixture for pattern.state-axis-rewrites-routes; it defines an original scenario boundary and expected observable evidence, not a claim that a game runtime has already executed it.

recoveryRequirements: Atomic rollback of layer and route table
Emergency return to last transition checkpoint
